stemHtml: What is the correct statement regarding groups and roles?

options.a: When entering a group with different goals, people will adopt different roles.
options.b: Roles in groups do NOT change.
options.c: Roles in groups are determined solely by individual preferences and do not adapt or change based on the group's needs or dynamics.
options.d: People within a group always assume the same roles regardless of the context or goals of the group.
